result.stdout:
_____________
< cowsay CLI >
 -------------
        \   ^__^
         \  (oo)\_______
            (__)\       )\/\
                ||----w |
                ||     ||

Usage:
  cowsay "Your message here"
  echo "Piped message" | cowsay
  fortune | cowsay

Options:
USAGE:
Basic usage:
  cowsay --cow default "Hello, World!"
Custom eyes:
  cowsay --cow default --eyes @@ "I see you"
Thinking cow:
  cowsay --cow default --think Hmm...
List all cow types:
  cowsay --cow default --list

  -l, --list          List all available cow formats
  -c, --cow           (Default: default) Choose a cow format (use -l to see all)
  -f, --file          Load cow from a .cow file or URL
  -e, --eyes          Set the cow's eyes (2 chars, e.g., '@@', 'xx', '$$')
  -t, --tongue        Set the cow's tongue (2 chars, e.g., 'U ', '~ ')
  -w, --wrap          Wrap text at N columns (default: 40)
  -T, --think         Make the cow think instead of say
  MESSAGE (pos. 0)    The message for the cow to say (or pipe from stdin)
